tools.name: list_cities
tools.description: List the cities with hotel booking-timing data on Best Time to Book Hotels. Optionally filter by a search string. Call this first to learn coverage.

tools.name: get_booking_advice
tools.description: Get a data-backed verdict on whether to book a hotel now or wait, for a city and stay dates. Based on tracked daily median prices.

tools.name: get_last_minute_deals
tools.description: Current last-minute hotel deals in a city: live rates below each hotel's tracked typical price, plus hotels that historically drop prices close to check-in.

tools.name: get_city_calendar
tools.description: Hot dates (events and holidays that push hotel prices up) and value windows (historically cheaper stretches) for a city in a date range.
